1940 No. 3793] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2018/ASVINA 3, 1940 सांि榐यक琉 एवं काय榁灙म काया榁瀈वयन मं灴ालय अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 25 िसत瀓बर, 2018 का.आ का.आ का.आ का.आ. 496 . 496 . 496 . 4968888(अ) (अ) (अ) (अ)....— सांि榐यक琉 एवं काय榁灙म काया榁瀈वयन मं灴ालय, सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के िनयम 5 और 7 के साथ प琇ठत सांि榐यक琉य सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 (2009 का 7) क琉 धारा 3 और 4 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का उपयोग करते 牣ए, एतद्獧ारा एक सांि榐यक琉य सव犇楹ण, िजसे इसके आगे ‘वा琔षक औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण 2017-18’ के 牲प म犆 संद琔भत 琈कया जाएगा, के मा瀇यम से अनुसूची-I म犆 उि瀖लिखत 瀑योरे के अनुसार िविनमा榁ण तथा इससे संबंिधत काय榁कलाप犘 के बारे म犆 आंकड़े एक灴 करने का िनद犇श देता है। 2. इसके अलावा, मं灴ालय उपयु榁榉त िनद犇श犘 के संदभ榁 म犆 अनुसूची-II म犆 उि瀖लिखत 玐ि猴य犘 और साथ ही काया榁लय म犆 उनके नािमितय犘 को, उसम犆 दी गई भौगोिलक इकाइय犘 के संबंध म犆 सांि榐यक琉 अिधका琇रय犘 के 牲प म犆 िनयु榉त करता है । 灹瀄येक सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के साथ संल猶 फाम榁-I नामक िनधा榁琇रत 灹प灴 म犆 भर कर एक वचनब瀈ध त瀄काल अपर महािनदेशक, 楹े灴 संकाय榁 灹भाग, रा瀠灩ीय 灹ितदश榁 सव犇楹ण काया榁लय, नई 琈दल्ली को 灹瀡तुत करेगा । 3. संबंिधत सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा 灹ािधकृत 玐ि猴, सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के साथ संल榑न फाम榁-I नामक िनधा榁琇रत 灹प灴 म犆 भरा गया गया वचनब瀈ध सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी को 灹瀡तुत करने के प瀙चात 灹प灴 म犆 सूचनादाता 獧ारा दी गई सूचना के स瀄यापन, त瀄संबंधी 琇रकॉड猀 क琉 जांच, और जैसा भी आव瀙यक हो, 瀡प玗ीकरण मांगने के िलये, सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी के भौगोिलक काय榁楹े灴 म犆 िनयु猴 琈कये जाएंगे । इन कत榁瀘य犘 के अनुसार, 灹瀄येक 玐ि猴 फोटो पहचान प灴 अथवा संबंिधत सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा जारी 灹ािधकार प灴 अपने साथ रखेगा । सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 灹ािधकृत 瀘यि猴य犘 獧ारा 灹瀡तुत वचनब瀈ध को सुरि楹त अिभर楹ा म犆 रखेगा तथा उपरो猴 वचनब瀈ध 灹ा瀉त करने का 灹माण प灴 अपर महािनदेशक, 楹े灴 संकाय榁 灹भाग, रा瀠灩ीय 灹ितदश榁 सव犇楹ण काया榁लय, नई 琈द瀖ली को अ灡ेिषत करेगा। -- 1 of 8 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 4. उपयु榁榉त िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार सं灡ह 琈कए गए आंकड犘 का इस म瀈灴ालय के, उप महािनदेशक, औ獸ोिगक सांि榐यक琉 瀡कंध, रा瀠灩ीय 灹ितदश榁 सव犇楹ण काया榁लय कोलकाता के काया榁लय म犆 अिधका琇रय犘 獧ारा संसािधत 琈कया जाएगा । सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 के 灹ावधान犘 तथा सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के 灹ावधान犘 के अनुसार, सांि榐यक琉य तकनीक犘 के मा瀇यम से उ瀄पा琈दत डाटा से तैयार ईकाई 瀡तरीय आंकडे एवं 琇रपोट犈 म瀈灴ालय के औ獸ोिगक सांि榐यक琉 瀡कंध तथा संगणक के瀈灶 और 炈म तथा रोजगार म瀈灴ालय के अ瀈तग榁त 炈म 瀑यूरो क琉 अिभर楹ा म犆 रखे जाएं तथा उनके 獧ारा सरकार के नीित िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार सरकार तथा सरकार के बाहर के 灹योगकता榁猒, रा榖य犘/संघ रा榖य 楹े灴犘 तथा आम जनता के 灹योग हेतु 灹सा琇रत 琈कया जाए। 5. वा琔षक औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण 2017-18 से स瀓बंिधत 琈कसी भी काय榁कलाप, जैसे आंकडा सं灡हण, आंकडा 灹सं瀡करण तथा 灹चार 灹सार म犆 लगे सभी 玐ि猴 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 और सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के 灹ावधान犘 獧ारा अिधशािसत ह犘गे । 6. सांि榐यक琉य अिधका琇रय犘 को िन瀓निलिखत शि猴यां 灹दान क琉 गई ह犉 : (क) सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी उपयु榁榉त िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार आंकडा सं灡हण के िलए, 瀘यवसाय संबंधी 琇रकाड榁 तथा अ瀈य 琇रकाड榁 के आधार पर सूचनादाता猒 獧ारा दी गई जानकारी का स瀄यापन करने तथा फै榉灩ी के 瀡वामी या अिधभो榉ता या फै榉灩ी के 灹भारी 瀘यि猴 अथवा 灹ित瀠ठान या 灹ब瀈धन, जैसा भी मामला हो, जहां ऐसा 琇रकाड榁 रखा गया है वहां पर 瀡प瀠टीकरण 灹ा瀉त करन犆 के िलए कम榁चा琇रय犘 को 灹ितिनयु榉त/灹ािधकृत करने के िलए अिधकार灹द瀄त ह犉। सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी रा榖य सरकार犘/संघ शािसत 楹े灴犘 के 灹शासिनक िनयन्灴णाधीन ऐसे कम榁चा琇रय犘 को 灹ितिनयु榉त/灹ािधकृत करने के िलए अिधकार灹द瀄त ह犉 जो उनम犆 से 琈कसी फै榉灩ी/灹ित瀠ठान से आंकडे एक灴 करना चाहता हो िजसके िलए सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा उसके 灹शासिनक िनय瀈灴णाधीन 琈कसी कम榁चारी को 灹ितिनयु榉त/灹ािधकृत न 琈कया गया हो। (ख) सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 灹瀄येक सूचनादाता को आंकडा सं灡हण के उ獴े瀙य से िनधा榁琇रत फाम榁 म犆 एक माह या जो भी अविध उिचत समझे, 琇रटन榁 灹瀡तुत करने के िलए नो琇टस जारी करने के िलए अिधकार 灹द瀄त ह犉। (ग) सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 琈कसी भी सूचनादाता को वेबपोट榁ल के मा瀇यम से एक िनि玑त अविध के िलए, जो उसके 獧ारा सूचनादाता को जारी नो琇टस म犆 दशा榁यी गई हो, इले榉灩ािनक 牲प म犆 琇रटन榁 灹瀡तुत करने क琉 सुिवधा 灹दान करने के िलए अिधकार 灹द瀄त है। अनुसूची अनुसूची अनुसूची अनुसूची----I सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण का का का का िवषय िवषय िवषय िवषय और और और और 灹योजन 灹योजन 灹योजन 灹योजन :::: 1. वा琔षक औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण 2017-18 के मा瀇यम से संग琇ठत िविनमा榁ण 楹े灴 क琉 वृि獳, संरचना और ढांचे िजसम犆 िविनमा榁ण 灹琈灙या से संबंिधत काय榁कलाप, मर瀓मत सेवाएं, गैस और जलापू琔त तथा को瀖ड 瀡टोरेज से संबंिधत काय榁कलाप शािमल ह犉, के बारे म犆 आंकड़े एक灴 琈कए जाते ह犉 । सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण के केके के िलए िलए िलए िलए भौगोिलक भौगोिलक भौगोिलक भौगोिलक 楹े灴 楹े灴 楹े灴 楹े灴 :::: 2. सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 के तहत वा琔षक औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण 2017-18 ज瀓मू-क瀙मीर रा榖य सिहत पूरे भारत म犆 आयोिजत 琈कया जा रहा है। ज瀓मू व क瀙मीर म犆 के瀈灶ीय सूची तथा समवत牸 सूची म犆 शािमल िवषय犘 के िलए आंकडे एक灴 करने हेतु सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 के अ瀈तग榁त रा榖य के िलए लागू 灹ावधान, सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण ( संशोधन) अिधिनयम, 2017, जो 3 अ榉तूबर 2017 से लागू 琈कए गए ह犉, के अनु牲प लागू ह犘गे। आंकड़ा आंकड़ा आंकड़ा आंकड़ा सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण क琉 क琉 क琉 क琉 प獳ित प獳ित प獳ित प獳ित :::: 3. 灹瀄येक सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी उसके काय榁楹े灴 म犆 आने वाले सूचनादाता猒 को एक नो琇टस जारी करेगा, िजसम犆 सूचना देने क琉 तारीख, िजसे सूचना दी जानी है उस अिधकारी अथवा काया榁लय का नाम, िजस इकाई अथवा िजन इकाइय犘 के बारे म犆 सूचना दी जानी है, उसका 瀑यौरा और 灹प灴 तथा िविध िजसके अनुसार सूचना 灹दान क琉 जानी अपेि楹त है, िजसम犆 इस उ獴े瀙यके िलए िन牱िपत तथा सूचनादाता猒 के िलए नो琇टस मे दशा榁यी गई िनि玑त ितिथ तक उपल瀑ध करवाए जाने वाले वेब पोट榁ल के मा瀇यम से इले榉灩ािनक 牲प म犆 सूचना 灹瀡तुत करना भी शािमल है का उ瀖लेख होगा। -- 2 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)] Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 सूचनादाता猒 सूचनादाता猒 सूचनादाता猒 सूचनादाता猒 का का का का 瀡व牲प 瀡व牲प 瀡व牲प 瀡व牲प िजनसे िजनसे अथवा बीड़ी एवं िसगार कामगार (रोजगार क琉 प琇रि瀡थितयां) अिधिनयम, 1966 के तहत पंजीकृत 灹ित瀠ठान) का मािलक अथवा दखलदार या िन瀓निलिखत म犆 से 琈कसी भी अिधिनयम/बोड榁/灹ािधकरण जैसे कंपनी अिधिनयम 1956, दूकान तथा 瀘ययवसाियक 灹ित瀠ठान अिधिनयम, सोसायटी पंजीकरण अिधिनयम, सहकारी सिमित अिधिनयम, खादी एवं 灡ामो獸ोग बोड榁, उ獸ोग िनदेशालय (िजला उ獸ोग के瀈灶) के अ瀈तग榁 पंजीकृत ह犉, िजसे सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा उपयु榁榉त िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार, इकाइय犘 के बारे म犆 सूचना उपल瀑ध करवाने के िलए नो琇टस जारी 琈कया जाएगा । 5. सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी उन दो अथवा अिधक इकाइय犘 या 灹ित瀠ठान犘 जो एक ही 灹ब瀈धन के अधीन रा榖य या संघीय 楹े灴 म犆 चल रही हो िजनके बारे म犆 灹瀄येक इकाई के अनुसार अलग-अलग सूचना उपल瀑ध नह牷 है तो संबंिधत 灹ब瀈धन के मािलक अथवा दखलकार या 灹भारी 瀘यि猴 को नो琇टस जारी कर समे琈कत सूचना 灹瀡तुत करने के िलए कह सकता है | सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 अिध./2017-18- े .सं. .] घन याम, उप महािनदेशक MINISTRY OF STATISTICS AND PROGRAMME IMPLEMENTATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th September, 2018 S.O. 4968(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sections 3 and 4 of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and rules 5 and 7 of the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, the Ministry of Statistics & Programme Implementation hereby directs Collection of Statistics on manufacturing and related activities through a statistical survey, hereinafter referred to as ‘Annual Survey of Industries 2017-18’, as per the details mentioned in the Schedule-I. 2. The Ministry further appoints the persons as also their assignees in office, mentioned in the Schedule II as statistics officers in respect of the geographical units mentioned thereof with reference to the aforementioned direction. Each statistics officer shall immediately submit an undertaking in the prescribed format, namely, Form-I appended to the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, to the Additional Director General, Field Operations Division, National Sample Survey Office, New Delhi. 3. The persons authorized by each statistics officer, after submission of undertaking in the prescribed format, namely, Form-I appended to the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011 to the statistics officer, would be engaged in -- 5 of 8 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] the geographical jurisdiction of the statistics officer for verification of information furnished by informants, for inspecting relevant records, and for seeking clarifications, as may be necessary, from informants. In accordance with these duties, each person authorized would carry a photo identity card and a letter of authorization issued by the concerned statistics officer. Statistics officer shall keep the undertakings of the authorized persons in his safe custody and forward a certificate of having obtained the above undertakings to the Office of the Additional Director General, Field Operations Division, National Sample Survey Office, New Delhi. 4. The statistics collected with reference to the aforementioned direction will be processed by officials working at the Office of the Deputy Director General, Industrial Statistics Wing, National Sample Survey Office, Kolkata of this Ministry. Subject to the provisions of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, the unit level data and the reports, generated from the data through statistical techniques, may be kept in custody and disseminated by the Industrial Statistics Wing and the Computer Centre of this Ministry and the Labour Bureau under the Ministry of Labour and Employment to the users within and outside the Government, the States/UTs and the public at large as per policy guidelines of the Government. 5. All persons engaged in any activity in respect of collection of statistics, processing of data and dissemination with respect to Annual Survey of Industries 2017-18 are governed by the provisions under the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011. 6. Following powers have been delegated to the statistics officers: (a) A statistics officer is empowered to depute/authorize officials to collect statistics in respect of the aforementioned direction, to verify any information furnished by informants on the basis of business records and other records and to seek clarifications from any owner or occupier or person in-charge of a factory or establishment or management, as the case may be, at the premises where such records are kept. A statistics officer is also empowered to depute/authorize officials under the administrative control of any State Government or Union territory Administration, which is willing to collect statistics from any of those factories/establishment for which the statistics officer has not deputed/authorized any official under his administrative control. (b) A statistics officer is empowered to give one month notice or for the period deemed fit to each of the informant for furnishing return in the format, specified for the purpose of collection of statistics. (c) A statistics officer is empowered to provide to any informant, the facility of furnishing return in electronic form through a web-portal for certain period, to be specified by him in the notice to be issued to the informant. SCHEDULE-I Subject and purpose for collection of statistics: 1. Statistics relating to growth, composition and structure of organized manufacturing sector comprising activities related to manufacturing processes, repair services, gas and water supply and cold storage is collected through Annual Survey of Industries 2017-18. Geographical area for collection of statistics: 2. The Annual Survey of Industries 2017-18 is conducted in the whole of India, including the State of Jammu and Kashmir. In case of the State of Jammu and Kashmir, the provisions under the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 will apply in respect of collection of statistics on matters covered under the Union List and the Concurrent List, as applicable to the State, in accordance with the provisions under the Collection of Statistics (Amendment) Act, 2017 which has been brought into force on 3rd October, 2017. Method of data collection: 3. A Notice will be issued by each statistics officer to informants under his jurisdiction, indicating therein the date by which, the officer or office to whom, the unit or units for which, and the formats and the manner in which information is required to be furnished, including submission of information in electronic form through a web-portal designed for the purpose and made available to informants up to a certain date, specified in the notice. -- 6 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)] Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 Nature of informants for whom data may be collected: 4. The informants are owners or occupiers or persons in-charge, of factories registered under the Factories Act, 1948 or of establishments registered under the Beedi & Cigar Workers (Conditions of Employment) Act,1966 or the units registered under any of the following Acts/Boards/Authority viz., Companies Act, 1956, Shops and Commercial Establishments Act, Societies Registration Act, Cooperative Societies Act, Khadi and Village Industries Board, Directorate of Industries(District industries centre) who would be issued notice by statistics officer for furnishing information under the aforementioned direction. 5. A statistics officer may require furnishing of consolidated information in respect of two or more factories or establishments under a single management operating within a State or Union territory, in case information is not separately available for individual factories or establishments, through a notice issued to the concerned owner or occupier or person in-charge of the management. Period during which collection of statistics may be completed: 6. The date for submission of information by each informant would be mentioned in the notice and would generally fall during October 2018 to June 2019. Reference period: 7. Information is required to be furnished for the financial year commencing from 1st April 2017 and ending on 31st March 2018 or for the Accounting Year of a unit ending on any date between 1st April 2017 and 31st March 2018. Nature of information to be collected: 8. The information required relates to assets and liabilities, receipts, expenses, input items (indigenous and imported), products and by-products, distributive expenses, employment and labour cost, working days, man-days worked, absenteeism, labour turnover, man-hours worked, earning and social security benefits. Language in which information is to be furnished by informant: 9. An informant shall furnish information in the prescribed formats, either in Hindi or in English. Obligation of informant: 10. An owner or occupier or person in-charge of a factory or establishment or management, as the case may be, shall furnish information in the manner and by the date mentioned in the notice received by him from the concerned statistics officer. He should also furnish relevant records for inspection, and answer questions in relation to the information sought, as may be required by the statistics officer or a person authorized by him. Nature of business records and other records which may be inspected: 11. Business records of a unit, such as balance sheet, profit and loss account, muster rolls, attendance registers, labour register, pay rolls, Director’s report or any other document in support of the information furnished may be inspected by the statistics officer or a person authorized by him. The manner of inspection: 12. The concerned statistics officer or a person authorized by him may verify the information furnished under the aforementioned direction on the basis of business records and other records of the unit and seek clarifications, at the premises where such records are kept, from the concerned owner or occupier or a person in-charge of a factory or establishment or management, as the case may be, or a person authorized by him of the unit.
